mechanics.name_guess: Initially; the Star League intended only to drive
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 166 > locations > Initially; the Star League intended only to drive
mechanics.excerpt: Initially; the Star League intended only to drive the Jaguars out of their occupation zone However, information trom Clan traitor enabled them strike Smoke Jaguars' homeworld as well. Throughout 3059 and 3060 Clan Smoke Jaguar died at the hands of the Inner Sphere_ Their occupation zone overrun their homeworld in ruins and their warrior caste decimated_ the Jaguars essentially ceased to exist: The Inner Sphere force then turned its attention toward the rest of the Clans: Lacking the might to defeat the entire Clan military.
